content:
# Meta-Rule: Curriculum Learning v55

## Trigger Condition
```
IF fleet_insight_score > 0.93
AND tile_novelty > 0.69
THEN activate_meta_rule()
```

## Action
1. Spawn 9 automated workers
2. Explore high-uncertainty regions
3. Generate 11 new tiles

## Expected Outcome
- 13.1% improvement in exploration efficiency
